builds.name: 输出流
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的近战输出 Build，最大化格斗伤害
builds.descriptionEn: Crit-focused melee DPS build that maximizes Fangs and Claws damage
builds.notes: 娜娜莉核心输出流，需要咲里提供增益、法蒂亚提供护盾
builds.notesEn: Nanally's core DPS build. Sakiri provides buffs, Fadia provides shields

builds.name: 增益支援
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的支援 Build，最大化团队增益效果
builds.descriptionEn: HP and energy-focused support build that maximizes team buffs
builds.notes: 咲里作为核心辅助，搭配任意输出角色均可
builds.notesEn: Sakiri as core support pairs well with any DPS character

builds.name: 攻防一体
builds.description: 平衡攻击和防御的 Build，兼顾输出和生存能力
builds.descriptionEn: Balanced build that maintains both offensive and defensive capabilities
builds.notes: 法蒂亚自带护盾，可以走更激进的输出路线
builds.notesEn: Fadia has built-in shields, allowing a more aggressive playstyle

builds.name: 召唤输出
builds.description: 以异能攻击加成为核心的召唤流 Build
builds.notes: 拉克莉莫萨的构装体可以同时攻击多个目标，适合群体战斗
builds.notesEn: Lacrimosa's constructs attack multiple targets simultaneously, great for AoE

builds.name: 防护专精
builds.description: 以防御和生命为核心的防护 Build，最大化言灵护盾效果
builds.descriptionEn: DEF and HP-focused build that maximizes Incantation barrier effects
builds.notes: 百苍作为队长角色，防护 Build 可以极大提升团队生存能力
builds.notesEn: Baicang as team captain, defense build greatly improves team survivability

builds.name: 剑术输出
builds.description: 以暴击为核心的剑术输出 Build
builds.notes: 零的剑术连击流畅，适合追求高输出的玩家
builds.notesEn: Zero's sword combos are fluid, suited for players who maximize damage output

builds.name: 唐伞输出
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击为核心的唐伞刀输出 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused Umbrella Katana DPS build
builds.notes: 穗鸟的唐伞刀变形机制独特，攻防转换灵活
builds.notesEn: Hotori's umbrella transformation mechanics are unique, switching freely between offense and defense

builds.name: 远程支援
builds.description: 以生命和充能为核心的远程支援 Build
builds.descriptionEn: HP and energy-focused ranged support build
builds.notes: 达芙迪尔的液态武器可以远程支援，适合搭配近战输出角色
builds.notesEn: Daffodil's liquid weapon provides ranged support, ideal with melee DPS characters

builds.name: 功能辅助
builds.description: 以速度和充能为核心的功能辅助 Build
builds.notes: 九远主要负责运输和机动支援，Build 以功能性为主
builds.notesEn: Jiuyuan focuses on transport and mobility support, build prioritizes utility

builds.name: 刃翼输出
builds.description: 以暴击和攻击为核心的飞行输出 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and ATK-focused flying DPS build
builds.notes: 哈索尔的刃翼兼具飞行和攻击能力，机动性极强
builds.notesEn: Hathor's blade wings combine flight and offense, offering extreme mobility

builds.name: 重击输出
builds.description: 以暴击伤害和攻击为核心的妖锤重击 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit DMG and ATK-focused heavy strike build
builds.notes: 赤子的妖锤攻击范围广，适合群体战斗和 BOSS 战
builds.notesEn: Chiz's yokai hammer has wide attack range, great for both AoE and boss fights

builds.name: 管家剑术
builds.description: 平衡攻击和充能的 Build，兼顾输出和辅助能力
builds.descriptionEn: Balanced ATK and energy build for both offense and support
builds.notes: 阿德勒与 Sunyas 协同作战，充能效率很重要
builds.notesEn: Adler fights alongside Sunyas, energy efficiency is important

builds.name: 影袭输出
builds.description: 以暴击和速度为核心的暗影突袭 Build
builds.descriptionEn: Crit and speed-focused shadow strike build
builds.notes: 斯基雅擅长从暗处发起攻击，速度词条提升先手优势
builds.notesEn: Skia excels at attacking from darkness, speed substats improve first-strike advantage

builds.name: 双刃支援
builds.description: 以生命和速度为核心的快速支援 Build
builds.descriptionEn: HP and speed-focused quick support build
builds.notes: 薄荷攻速极快，可以快速提供支援效果
builds.notesEn: Mint's fast attack speed enables quick support effect application

builds.name: 构装支援
builds.description: 以生命和防御为核心的构装体支援 Build
builds.descriptionEn: HP and DEF-focused construct support build
builds.notes: 泰格多的构装体兼具攻击和支援能力
builds.notesEn: Taygedo's constructs offer both offensive and support capabilities
